project_type: Single-page HTML document (course work / kurs ishi)
language: HTML with inline CSS, content in Uzbek
test_framework: None - visual verification by opening in browser
verification_instructions: Open index.html in a browser and verify page count is 45, formatting matches requirements, TOC page numbers are correct
setup_instructions: No setup needed - plain HTML file
environment_constraints: GitHub access via Kiro Powers for pushing. Must use github push_to_remote tool, not git push directly. Push to main branch. Push every 2 pages completed.
contribution_requirements: Push incremental changes to main branch via GitHub Power every 2 pages completed
key_patterns: Each page is a <div class='page'> element. Current file has 70 pages, needs exactly 45. Content about 'Muzqaymoq do'koni boshqaruv tizimi'. Pages use fixed A4 dimensions with CSS.
directory_structure: Single file repository: index.html (2709 lines, ~320KB, 70 pages currently)

target_structure.page_2: Mundarija (TOC) - numbered page 1 but no visible number

formatting_requirements.page_numbering: Arabic numerals, center bottom, starts from mundarija (but mundarija itself has no visible number)
